translit: vayomer dovid elgod tzarli meod niplohno veyadyhovo kirabim rachamoyv vvyadodom alepolo:

rachum vechanun chotosi lefoneycho Adonoy molei rachamim racheim olay vekabeil tachanunoy: Adonoy albapcho sochicheini vealbachamoscho seyasreini: choneini Adonoy ki umlal oni refoeini Adonoy ki nivhalu atzomoy: venafshi nivhalo meod veato Adonoy admosoy: shuvo Adonoy chaltzo nafshi hoshieini lemaan chasdecho: ki eiyn bamoves zichrecho bishol miyode loch: yogatibanchosi asche vechollaylo mitosi bedimosi arsi amse: oshsho mikaas eiyni osko becholtzorroy:  mimeni kolpoaleiy oven kishoma Adonoy kol bichyi: shoma Adonoy techinosi Adonoy tefilosi yikoch: yeivshu veyibohalu meod koloyvoy yoshuvu yeivshu roga:
Adonoy eloheiy yisroeil  meicharon apecho vehinocheim alhoroo leamecho:
habeit mishomayim vrei ki hoyinu laag vokeles bagoyim: nechshavnu katzon lotevach yuvol, laharog vlabeid vlmako vlcherpo: vvcholzos shimcho lo shochochnu no altishkocheinu:
Adonoy eloheiy yisroeil  meicharon apecho vehinocheim alhoroo leamecho:

zorim omrim eiyn tocheles vesikvo: chon om leshimcho mekave: tohor, yeshuoseinu korvo, yoganu velo hunachlonu: rachameycho yichbshu eskaascho meioleiynu: ono  meicharoncho veracheim segulo asher bochorto:
Adonoy eloheiy yisroeil  meicharon apecho vehinocheim alhoroo leamecho:
chuso Adonoy oleiynu berachameycho, veal titneinu bideiy achzorim: lomo yomru hagoyim ayeihno eloheiyhem lemaancho asei imonu chesed veal teachar: ono  meicharoncho veracheim segulo asher bochorto:
Adonoy eloheiy yisroeil  meicharon apecho vehinocheim alhoroo leamecho:

koleinu sishma vesochon vealtitsheinu beyad oyveiynu limchos esshmeinu: zechor asher nishbato laavoseiynu, kechochveiy hashomayim arbe eszarachem veato nisharnu meat meiharbei: vvcholzos shimcho lo shochochnu no al tishkocheinu:
Adonoy eloheiy yisroeil  meicharon apecho vehinocheim alhoroo leamecho:
ozreinu eloheiy yisheinu aldvar kevodshmecho vehatzileinu vechapeir alchatoseiynu lemaan shemecho:
Adonoy eloheiy yisroeil  meicharon apecho vehinocheim alhoroo leamecho:
shomeir yisroeil shemor sheeiris yisroeil veal yovad yisroeil hoomrim shema yisroeil:
shomeir goy echod shemor sheeiris am echod veal yovad goy echod hamyachadim shimcho Adonoy eloheiynu Adonoy echod:
shomeir goy kodosh shemor sheeiris am kodosh veal yovad goy kodosh hamshalshim besholsh kedushos lekodosh:
misratze berachamim vmispayeis besachanunim hisratze vehispayeis ledor oni ki eiyn ozeir: ovinu malkeinu choneinu vaaneinu ki eiyn bonu maasim asei imonu tzedoko vochesed vehoshieinu:

vaanachnu lo neida ma naase ki oleycho eiyneiynu: zechor rachameycho Adonoy vachasodeycho ki meiolom heimo: yehi chasdcho Adonoy oleiynu kaasher yichalnu loch: al tizkor lonu aonos rishonim maheir yekadmunu rachameycho ki dalonu meod: choneinu Adonoy choneinu kirav sovanu : berogez racheim tizkor: ki  yoda yitzreinu zochur ki ofor anochnu: ozreinu eloheiy yisheinu aldvar kevodshmecho vehatzileinu vechapeir alchatoseiynu lemaan shemecho:
